name: Francis Ngannou
oneLiner: The heavyweight terror case: historic power, Stipe title value, Gane defense value, and a UFC run capped before long-reign volume.
compareShortCase: Ngannou is the heavyweight terror case: historic power, a title win over Stipe, a defense over Gane, and a prime that felt more dangerous than almost anyone's.
compareCounter: The argument against Ngannou is title volume. His peak danger is obvious, but he does not have the long UFC championship run of the top heavyweight resume case.
